content_body: You home is lovely - so much so that we are having a hard time leaving. I think we've spent most of our time enjoying the scenery from the porch. Side trips for horseback riding, fishing, and Mercier's have allowed us to be out so that we could spot several deer, and of course, that beautiful scenery! The picnic table on the porch is just perfect for gathering around and discussing the day's plans. All in all your home in the mountains has proven to be the perfect place to be! Thanks so much for sharing it with us. We look forward to returning.
title: North Georgia Offers Beautiful Scenery
